sn35.228:1.0.1: "Bhikkhus, the uninstructed worldling speaks of ‘the ocean, the ocean.’ But that is not the ocean in the Noble One's Discipline; that is only a great mass of water, a great expanse of water.
sn35.228:1.0.2: One who withstands that current consisting of forms is said to have crossed the ocean of the eye with its waves, whirlpools, sharks, and demons.Crossed over, gone beyond, the brahmin stands on high ground.
sn35.228:1.0.3: "One who has crossed this ocean so hard to cross,With its dangers of sharks, demons, waves,The knowledge-master who has lived the holy life,Reached the world's end, is called one gone beyond."
